text.title: nodejs-express-fastify Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure for production Node HTTP service.

step.name: scaffold-app
step.action: Add app.ts (Express) or server.ts (Fastify); register helmet/cors/json/pino/rate-limit BEFORE routes.
step.output: app.ts with the middleware order from r1.
step.decision-gate: If using Express 5+, document the auto-async-propagation; otherwise add the try/catch wrap helper.

step.name: declare-schemas-at-module-scope
step.action: Declare Zod/TypeBox schemas at the top of the route module; pass into the handler.
step.output: One schema per endpoint, all module-scoped.
step.decision-gate: Bench the route under load; if compile time leaks in, the schema was per-request.

step.name: centralize-error-handler
step.action: Register one error middleware AFTER routes that maps AppError to Problem+JSON.
step.decision-gate: Block merge if any handler calls res.status(4xx|5xx).json on its own.

step.name: graceful-shutdown
step.action: Add process.on('SIGTERM', shutdown) and SIGINT; shutdown calls server.close + db.end + 15s fallback timeout.
step.decision-gate: If running under PM2, ensure kill_timeout >= drainSeconds.
